controls.name: Closed-won opportunities tie to a contract
controls.action: RevOps to create the missing contracts or close the opportunities.
controls.description: Every closed-won opportunity must convert to a contract or have a documented exception.

controls.name: Active contracts tie to a sales order
controls.action: Provision the missing sales orders for the active contracts.
controls.description: Every active contract must convert to a sales order.

controls.name: Active orders tie to a billing schedule
controls.action: Billing to build schedules for the unscheduled orders.
controls.description: Every active sales order must have a billing schedule so it gets invoiced.

controls.name: Scheduled billable amounts are invoiced
controls.action: Invoice the unbilled lines; this is direct revenue leakage.
controls.description: Every scheduled, due line must be invoiced (invoice exists) or carry a valid billing block.

controls.name: Invoice amount matches the scheduled bill amount
controls.action: Re-bill or credit/rebill the mismatched invoices.
controls.description: Invoice amount must match the scheduled bill amount within tolerance.

controls.name: PO present where the customer requires one
controls.action: Obtain and attach the PO before the invoice is collectible.
controls.description: Customers that require a PO must have a PO number on the invoice.

controls.name: No duplicate invoices
controls.action: Void the duplicate invoices and notify the affected customers.
controls.description: No duplicate invoice for the same customer / order / service period / amount.

controls.name: AR subledger ties to the control balance
controls.action: Reconcile invoice status to the cash/credit transactions.
controls.description: Invoice totals minus credits and applications must tie to open AR by status.

controls.name: Payments tie to a bank receipt
controls.action: Match the payments to the bank statement or reverse them.
controls.description: Every recorded payment must tie to a bank receipt (proof of cash).

controls.name: Bank receipts are applied or documented
controls.action: Apply the receipt to AR or document the unapplied reason.
controls.description: Every bank receipt must tie to a cash application with applied_amount > 0, or carry a documented unapplied reason. A zero-amount application is not valid.

controls.name: Revenue recognized within service / contract terms
controls.action: Reverse and re-recognize the out-of-period revenue.
controls.description: Recognized revenue must fall within the service period and contract term.

controls.name: Deferred revenue rollforward foots
controls.action: Investigate and correct the deferred revenue rollforward breaks.
controls.description: opening + billings - recognized + adjustments + fx must equal closing deferred.

controls.name: Exposure within the approved credit limit
controls.action: Place on hold or obtain a documented credit-limit override.
controls.description: Customer exposure must not exceed the approved credit limit unless approved.

controls.name: No active orders for customers on credit hold
controls.action: Block or cancel the orders pending credit release.
controls.description: Customers on credit hold must not have active (new) sales orders.

controls.name: Disputed cash is routed out of collections
controls.action: Route disputed AR to the owner team; exclude from cash targets.
controls.description: Disputed (cash-blocked) invoices must be excluded from the cash forecast and owned.

controls.name: Billing timeliness
controls.action: Accelerate the late invoices to protect DSO.
controls.description: On-time billing 95.52% vs 90.0% target.

controls.name: DSO above target
controls.action: Prioritize collections on the oldest, largest balances.
controls.description: DSO 169.0 days (best possible 43.8).

controls.name: Aged AR concentration
controls.action: Escalate the 90+ balances; assess reserve adequacy.
controls.description: 39.8% of open AR is 90+ days (limit 25.0%).

controls.name: Broken promises to pay
controls.action: Re-engage and escalate broken promises.
controls.description: 41 promises to pay are past due and unpaid.

controls.name: Unapplied cash
controls.action: Clear unapplied cash to recognize true collections.
controls.description: Unapplied cash is 1.0% of receipts (limit 5.0%).

controls.name: Dispute rate
controls.action: Drive root-cause fixes on the top dispute reasons.
controls.description: Disputed AR is 3.02% of open AR (limit 8.0%).

controls.name: Manual credit memo rate
controls.action: Investigate credit-memo drivers (pricing, billing errors).
controls.description: Credit memos are 11.2% of invoices (limit 10.0%).

controls.name: Non-standard payment terms
controls.action: Review non-standard terms for cash-flow and policy alignment.
controls.description: 1 customers are on non-standard payment terms.

controls.name: Stale customer credit review
controls.action: Schedule overdue credit reviews.
controls.description: 7 customers have a credit review older than 365 days.

controls.name: FX gain/loss on cash application
controls.action: Review FX policy and revaluation on multi-currency receipts.
controls.description: Absolute FX gain/loss on applications is 41585.87 (limit 10000.0).

metrics.name: bookings_amount
metrics.definition: Total contract value signed in the period.

metrics.name: contracted_arr
metrics.definition: Annual recurring revenue contracted in the period.

metrics.name: scheduled_billings
metrics.definition: Scheduled, due, billable amount for the period.

metrics.name: deferred_revenue_ending
metrics.definition: Deferred revenue balance at period end.

metrics.name: best_possible_dso
metrics.definition: DSO if only current AR were outstanding.

metrics.name: billing_timeliness_pct
metrics.definition: Invoices issued within the allowed delay.

metrics.name: invoice_accuracy_pct
metrics.definition: Invoices matching the scheduled bill amount.

metrics.name: unbilled_revenue_amount
metrics.definition: Scheduled billable amount not yet invoiced.

metrics.name: revenue_leakage_estimate
metrics.definition: Estimated revenue lost to unbilled work.

metrics.name: disputed_ar_pct
metrics.definition: Disputed AR as a share of open AR.

metrics.name: unapplied_cash_amount
metrics.definition: Cash received but not applied to AR.

metrics.name: broken_promise_amount
metrics.definition: Promised amounts past due and unpaid.

metrics.name: hard_control_failure_count
metrics.definition: Number of hard controls failing (blocks reporting).

metrics.name: soft_warning_count
metrics.definition: Number of soft controls in warning.

top_issues.message: USD 110,014 unbilled revenue (12 lines): direct leakage
11 customers over credit limit (USD 1,490,309 above approved)
O2C audit opinion: ADVERSE - 14 hard control(s) fail; reporting is blocked
9 active contracts (USD 595,100) have no sales order
19 invoices do not match the scheduled amount (USD 105,330)
